full_text:
Lü Kuang 呂曠
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lü Kuang (呂曠). Served Yuan Shang. Defected to Yuan Tan then Cao Cao. Attacking Liu Bei, killed by Zhao Yun. Lü Kuang was affiliated with Yuan Tan, Yuan Shang, and the Wei Kingdom.
